qa_pairs.question: What modules need to be loaded before compiling the petscFoam solver?
qa_pairs.answer: You need to load the modules StdEnv/2023, gcc/12.3, openmpi/4.1.5, openfoam/v2412, and petsc/3.21.6.

qa_pairs.question: Which package needs to be downloaded and extracted to compile the petscFoam solver?
How do I download the external-solver-main.tar.gz package?
qa_pairs.answer: You can download it using the command `wget https://develop.openfoam.com/modules/external-solver/-/archive/main/external-solver-main.tar.gz`.

qa_pairs.question: What is the command to extract the external-solver-main.tar.gz package?
qa_pairs.answer: To extract the package, run `tar xvfz external-solver-main.tar.gz`.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find the external-solver-main.tar.gz package?
